<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/v1/companies/{company_uuid}/signatories/{signatory_uuid}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Deletes a company signatory.

- [Signatory Events](doc:signatory-events)

scope: `signatories:manage`
